title: HCP Portal Order Submission Latency Spike — P1
summary: Order submission endpoint experienced 3x latency increase (P95 from 400ms to 1.2s) between 09:15 and 10:45 UTC. Root cause: upstream formulary lookup service returning stale cache entries causing retry storms. Mitigation: increased cache TTL and added circuit breaker. Resolution: normal latency restored by 10:45 UTC. Post-mortem scheduled.
